response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video content. Identified two distinct musical performances.
2. Song 1 (00:00 - 03:59): Identified through on-screen text 'ホロライブ甲子園 2025' and performance context. Searched 'ホロライブ甲子園 2025 テーマ曲 青い空に 歌詞'. Found song title '青い空に' and composer藤永龍太郎 (Elements Garden). Retrieved full lyrics.
3. Song 2 (03:59 - 04:59): Identified through on-screen text 'My Soul, Your Beats!' and '作詞・作曲：麻枝准'. Searched 'My Soul, Your Beats! 麻枝准 歌詞' and verified metadata (Jun Maeda). Retrieved full lyrics and English translation.
4. Structured the JSON response with identified metadata and full lyrics as per the required schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two distinct musical performances by Hololive VTubers. The first part features a performance of '青い空に' (Aoi Sora ni), which is the theme song for the 'Hololive Koshien 2025' event. The second part features a performance of the popular song 'My Soul, Your Beats!', originally by Lia, with lyrics and composition by Jun Maeda.

scenes.description: VTubers perform '青い空に', the Hololive Koshien 2025 theme song. On-screen text includes 'ホロライブ甲子園 2025'. The performance involves dancing on a stage themed after the event.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, and others
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
少し伸びた影法師 “Hi Hi”
雨上がりの紫陽花 “Hi Hi”
雲一つない空が “Hi Hi”
青の季節を告げたんだ

“ねえ”
今日は何をしようか？
シナリオなんてない
“だから”そうだ
“君と”僕で
描いていかなくちゃ

キラキラの日々が
僕らを待ってる そうでしょ？
準備はOK？ドキドキが止まらない
行くよ！
スリー！ツー！ワン！で飛び出そう “Hi Hi”
全力疾走 駆け抜けろ “Hi Hi”
君が笑って 僕も笑った
なんてことはないけれど
こんな想いになってしまうのは “Hi Hi”
きっと、きっと 君のせいだ
まだ知らない明日が待ってる

自転車で下る坂
車窓から見えた海
夕焼けに滲む世界
空に咲く火の花
沢山の宝物を一緒に見つけよう

だから 行くよ！
スリー！ツー！ワン！で飛び出そう “Hi Hi”
全力疾走 駆け抜けろ “Hi Hi”
君が笑って 僕も笑った
なんてことはないけれど
こんな想いになってしまうのは “Hi Hi”
きっと、きっと 君のせいだ
澄み切った青が僕らを染めて
まだ知らない明日が待ってる
待ってる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A slightly lengthened silhouette "Hi Hi"
Hydrangeas after the rain "Hi Hi"
A cloudless sky "Hi Hi"
Told me of the blue season

"Hey," what shall we do today?
There is no scenario
"So," I thought,
"With you," I must draw it
Together with me

Glittering days
Are waiting for us, right?
Preparation OK? My heart won't stop pounding
I'm going! Three! Two! One! Let's jump out "Hi Hi"
Full speed ahead, run through it "Hi Hi"
You laughed, and I laughed too
It's nothing special, but
To have these kinds of feelings "Hi Hi"
Must surely, surely be your fault
An unknown tomorrow is waiting

The hill I descend by bicycle
The sea I saw from the train window
The world blurring into the sunset
Fireworks blooming in the sky
Let's find many treasures together

So I'm going! Three! Two! One! Let's jump out "Hi Hi"
Full speed ahead, run through it "Hi Hi"
You laughed, and I laughed too
It's nothing special, but
To have these kinds of feelings "Hi Hi"
Must surely, surely be your fault
The clear blue dyes us
An unknown tomorrow is waiting
Waiting

scenes.description: The VTubers perform 'My Soul, Your Beats!', the opening theme from Angel Beats!. On-screen text credits the lyrics and music to Jun Maeda. The performance is dynamic with holographic stage elements.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐるとほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹き抜ける風
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾億の星が消え去ってくのを
見送った
手を振った
よかったね、と

廊下の隅見下ろす 掃除の途中
おかしなものだと思う
あたしの中の時は止まってるのに
違う日々を生きてるように
埃は雪のように降り積む
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震え出す今この時が
見つけた気がした
失われた記憶が呼び覚ました
物語
永遠の
その終わり

いつの間にか駆けだしてた
あなたに手を引かれてた
昨日は遠く 明日はすぐ
そんな当たり前に心が躍った
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾千の朝を越え 新しい陽が
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えてるこの魂が
見つけた気がした
幾億の夢のように消え去れる日を
見送った
手を振った
ありがとう、と
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Waking up and repeating the cycle, to a sleepy morning
I tighten the tie around my neck
When I pass through the classroom door, I can walk in with my chest puffed out proudly
Such a wind blows past everyday life
I thought I heard it
I even thought I felt it
Now it starts to shake within my chest
I thought it would come soon
As those millions of stars vanished
I watched them fade
I waved them good-bye
I'm glad

Looking down from the corner of the hall as I sweep
I think something is odd
Even though the time within me has stopped
It's like I'm living different days
The dust falls and piles up like snow
I thought they were waiting
I even thought they were calling out
Now my time starts to shake
I thought I found it
I awaken lost memories
That's the end
Of the eternal
Story

Before I knew it, I was running
You were pulling my hand
Yesterday is long past; tomorrow is just ahead
My heart raced at such obviousness
I thought I heard it
I even thought I felt it
Now it starts to shake within my chest
I thought it would come soon
The new day passes through thousands of mornings
I thought it was waiting
I even thought it was calling out
My soul is shaking
I thought I found it
Like millions of dreams the day can vanish
I watched it fade
I waved it good-bye
Thank you
